mechanism_narrative: Positive 3-month momentum in retail sales signals improving household demand and near-term revenue growth for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Reject if months with positive 3-month RSAFS growth do not deliver higher 20-day SPX returns than months with negative 3-month RSAFS growth, or if walk-forward Rank IC is below 0.03 for three consecutive years.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in unemployment signals weakening labor income and rising recession risk, reducing expected earnings and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by more than 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if triggered instances have positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases and average triggered returns are not below the unconditional average return.

mechanism_narrative: When CPI inflation accelerates while the federal funds rate remains pinned near zero, real policy accommodation supports nominal revenue growth and equity valuation multiples, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized growth is positive and FEDFUNDS is below 0.25
failure_condition: Reject if the CPIAUCSL-up and FEDFUNDS-below-0.25 interaction has lower 60-day SPX returns than non-triggered observations, or if the interaction coefficient is negative in walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production signals weakening physical output and pressure on cyclical earnings, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls for 2 consecutive monthly releases
failure_condition: Reject if two-month INDPRO declines are followed by positive 20-day SPX returns in more than 65% of triggered cases and the mean triggered return is not below the sample mean.

mechanism_narrative: A housing starts breakout above a high activity threshold signals stronger construction demand, durable-goods demand, and credit confidence, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST crosses above 1000 thousand units and its 6-month moving average is rising
failure_condition: Reject if HOUST breakouts above 1000 with rising 6-month averages do not produce higher 60-day SPX returns than all other observations, or if hit rate is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll gains combined with a falling unemployment rate signal broad labor-market tightening driven by demand rather than participation noise, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS rises by more than 150 thousand over 1 month and UNRATE declines over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-up and UNRATE-down signal does not outperform either single-series signal on 20-day forward returns, or if its average triggered return is below zero.

mechanism_narrative: A federal funds rate increase marks tighter discount-rate conditions and reduced liquidity support for equity multiples, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises by at least 0.25 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Reject if FEDFUNDS tightening triggers are followed by positive 60-day SPX returns in more than 60% of cases and the mean triggered return is not below the unconditional 60-day mean.

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP expansion accompanied by rising industrial production confirms that aggregate demand is translating into real output, lifting earnings expectations and producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over 5 trading days after releases.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 latest quarterly growth is positive and INDPRO 3-month change is positive
failure_condition: Reject if the joint positive GDPC1 and positive INDPRO condition has a 5-day SPX hit rate below 50% or fails to outperform periods when only one of the two proxies is positive.
